backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for Shows and DJs, including creating/assigning DJs to shows, and a `getCurrentShow` query that determines the currently airing show based on CST time.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, styles, and admin views for The Country Channel app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with public routes (Home, Shows, DJs) under a Layout and admin routes (Dashboard, ManageShows, ManageDJs) under an AdminLayout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a responsive sidebar navigation (desktop and mobile overlay), a top header bar with breadcrumb, and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/DJFormModa: A dialog modal for creating a new DJ or viewing an existing DJ's details; editing is disabled due to backend limitations, and creation submits name, bio, and photo URL via the useCreateDJ mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/ShowFormMo: A dialog modal for creating a new radio show or editing an existing show's DJ assignment; supports title, description, schedule day/time, and DJ selection with validation, using useCreateShow and useAssignDjToShow mutations.
frontend/src/components/DJCard.tsx: Card component displaying a DJ's avatar, name, bio, and associated shows with country-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with branding, quick links, live status indicator, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Public layout wrapper composing Navigation, a page Outlet, and Footer for all public-facing pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, nav links, an admin link, and a pulsing 'On Air' indicator that appears when a show is currently live.
frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx: Displays the currently airing radio show with DJ info, schedule, and an animated 'On Air' badge, or a placeholder message when nothing is live. Uses skeleton loading state and fetches data via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/RecentlyPlayed.t: Renders a 'Recently Played' section embedding a Live365 iframe widget that shows the latest tracks played on The Country Channel.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: A card component that displays a single radio show's title, description, schedule day/time, and associated DJ name using icons for visual structure.
frontend/src/components/WaysToListen.tsx: Renders a grid of platform cards (Live365, Radioline, OnlineRadioBox, GetMeRadio) with links, descriptions, and styled 'Listen Now' buttons for tuning into the station.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching shows, DJs, and the current show, as well as mutations for creating shows, creating DJs, and assigning DJs to shows via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm country-themed light and dark color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard overview page displaying stat cards (total shows, total DJs, assigned shows) and a recent shows list, with loading skeletons and links to management pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageDJs.tsx: Admin page for listing, adding, and editing DJs in a grid layout, using a modal form and displaying avatar, name, and bio for each DJ.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageShows.tsx: Admin page for listing, adding, and editing radio shows in a table layout, with loading skeletons, empty state, and a modal form for show creation/editing.
frontend/src/pages/DJs.tsx: Page component that displays a grid of DJ cards fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons and an empty state when no DJs exist.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner with a live listen button, followed by sections for the current on-air show, featured shows, and featured DJs pulled from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Shows.tsx: Page component that displays a grid of show cards fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons and an empty state when no shows are scheduled.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Source Serif 4), a country-themed color palette (amber, tan, burnt-orange, wood-dark, admin tokens), and animation keyframes for the project.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording version, feature list, architectural notes (CST timezone requirement), and known issues for 'The Country Channel' radio station web app.
